coverage.notes: Coverage now tracks the combined committed retail address corpus: all 348 Ghidra functions from functions.csv plus 96 additional HLIL-only addresses carried by the curated map. This pass closes the remaining export-table-adjacent HLIL-only wrappers after UI_HasUniqueCDKey, including the display-context refresh helper, the any-visible-menu predicate, the arena-name iterator, and the advertisement wait-screen drawer.

functions.comment: Returns the short retail callvote gametype token for a gametype enum, such as `ffa`, `duel`, `race`, `tdm`, `ca`, `ctf`, `oneflag`, `har`, `ft`, `dom`, `ad`, and `rr`. The retail `voteMap` branch later formats that token into `callvote map %s %s\n` from the active `ui_cvGameType` state, falling back to the empty string when the cvar is `-1`.
Parses the queued primary-weapon token and returns the 1-based retail starting-weapons table index used by UI_DrawStartingWeapons.
Builds a 3x3 axis matrix from Euler angles by calling AngleVectors and negating the intermediate right vector into axis[1].
Normalizes the angle delta a1 - a2 into the shared Quake range [-180, 180] for player animation and orientation code.
Multiplies two 3x3 axis matrices, exactly matching the shared tag-attachment and player-model composition helper.
Builds optional forward, right, and up vectors from Euler angles, matching the shared AngleVectors helper used by player preview code.
In-place parser prepass that strips comments, collapses whitespace, and preserves quoted strings.
Shared token parser with allowLineBreaks handling, comment skipping, quoted-string support, and the module-global token buffer.
Returns true when the inspected substring contains only digits with at most one decimal point, matching the retail choice-list formatting gate.
Case-insensitive bounded compare with Quake-style null handling used across parser and command dispatch paths.
Thin fixed-limit wrapper over Q_stricmpn that preserves the shared layer's null-sentinel return semantics.
Fatal-checking bounded string copy used throughout the retail UI utility layer.
In-place shared string cleaner that strips Quake color escapes and non-printable bytes while preserving printable ASCII.
Formats into a large temporary buffer, reports overflow, then copies into the bounded destination.
Formats into the rotating two-buffer varargs scratch ring used across the UI module.
Parses \\key\\value infostrings with alternating scratch buffers and returns the matched value.
Removes a key and its paired value from a mutable info string after oversize validation.
Rejects illegal info-string characters, removes any prior key, and appends the new \\key\\value pair.
Blends two RGB byte triplets with a fractional weight, applies a final scalar, clamps each channel, and returns a packed 0xRRGGBBFF color.
Unpacks a packed RGBA word into destination bytes, scales RGB by an integer brightness factor, and preserves the packed alpha byte.
Formats a fatal message and forwards it through the UI syscall error slot.
Formats a message and forwards it through the UI syscall print slot.
Fetches a cvar string into the shared 0x400-byte UI scratch buffer and returns it.
Sets the postgame ui_score* cvars, including mirrored second-player score fields.
Loads saved score and demo metadata from the per-map postgame files.
Retail-only console-command helper behind menu_close that reads argv(1), resolves the named menu, clears its open state, and runs the close path.
Retail-only console-command helper behind menu_open that reads argv(1) and forwards the requested menu name to Menus_ActivateByName.

Retail postgame core. It reads the `postgame` argv payload, loads and updates the per-map `games/%s_%i.game` record, computes bonuses and best-score state, restores the saved cvars, and drives the `ui_score*` cvar writes through `UI_SetBestScores`. The newer `matchSummary` cache in the current source tree is layered inside this flow as a reconstruction-side sidecar.

Dispatches the retail UI console commands, including listPlayerModels, ui_report, ui_load, postgame, ui_cache, menu_open, and menu_close. The committed HLIL shows the `postgame` branch going directly into `UI_CalcPostGameStats`, with no separate retail match-summary parser exposed in the current symbol map.
Scales 640x480 UI coordinates through the current xscale, yscale, and widescreen bias.
Draws a shader-backed picture rectangle and flips UVs when width or height are negative.
Fills a solid rectangle using the cached white shader and current color.
Reads an arena script file, validates size, and parses arena info blocks into the arena list.
Reads arena or bot info files into info-string records while enforcing the retail brace and EOF parse guards.
Loads the arena catalog via g_arenasFile and the scripts/arenas.txt fallback path.
Reads a bot script file, validates size, and parses bot info blocks.
Loads the bot catalog via g_botsFile and scripts/*.bot fallback enumeration.
Returns the cleaned bot name for a valid bot index and falls back to Sarge when no bot info is available.
Returns qtrue through the native export-table slot that replaces the old UI_HASUNIQUECDKEY vmMain case.
Extended native export-table helper that refreshes the 640x480 UI scale state through UI_RefreshDisplayContextScale and republishes the retail uiDC pointer.
Extended native export-table helper that lazily loads arenas and invokes a caller-supplied callback for each non-null arena display-name pointer.
Native module bootstrap that installs the export table and caches the syscall table pointer.
Registers gradient, FX art, scrollbars, slider art, and the crosshair shader set.
Draws the left and right edges of the UI outline rectangle.
Draws the top and bottom edges of the UI outline rectangle.
Lower-level retail text-bounds helper that measures string width and height through out-parameters and sits underneath the Text_Width and Text_Height wrappers.
HLIL-only wrapper over the retail text-bounds helper that returns width and is assigned to uiDC.textWidth during _UI_Init.
HLIL-only wrapper over the retail text-bounds helper that returns height and is assigned to uiDC.textHeight during _UI_Init.
Font renderer assigned into uiDC.drawText during _UI_Init.
Paints text while drawing a blinking insert or overstrike cursor at the active position.
Scaled-text helper behind UI_DrawServerMOTD that clips text against *maxX, temporarily projects the out-parameter into screen space, and draws through the retail import[94] text path.
Advances UI realtime and FPS state, refreshes cvars, paints menus, ticks the browser refresh work, and draws the cursor.
Tail-jumps through the syscall table to save cached LAN servers, matching the entire native shutdown entrypoint.
Loads a menu script into the static buffer with default fallback and size guards.
Parses assetGlobalDef menu blocks and populates shared UI asset definitions.
Opens a menu file buffer and parses its top-level assetGlobalDef and menudef blocks.
Loads a menu set with fallback-to-default handling and optional display reset.
Reloads the active menu file set from ui_menuFiles and the ingame fallback file.
Clamps the handicap cvar into the retail 5..100 range, indexes the handicap label table, and paints the selected value.
Computes the retail default capture and frag limits for the current gametype and writes either the ui_* preview cvars or the live gameplay cvars.
Paints the current single-player game-type label from the retail game-type table.
Validates ui_netGameType and ui_actualNetGameType against the retail bounds and paints the selected net game-type label.
Validates ui_joinGameType against the retail join-game-type count and paints the selected join label.
Clamps g_spSkill into the retail 1..5 range and paints the matching skill-level string.
Validates the active map selector for the chosen preview path, caches the levelshot shader on first use, and falls back to `menu/art/unknownmap` when no preview is available.
Resolves the active map's time-to-beat for the current gametype, formats it as `%02i:%02i`, and paints the result.
Runs or lazily starts the selected map cinematic, then falls back to UI_DrawMapPreview when the ROQ is unavailable.
Refreshes the cached player preview model from the retail model and headmodel cvars, updates the playerInfo block, and renders it through UI_DrawPlayer.
Builds and renders the forced team-model preview using cg_forceTeamModel, cg_forceTeamSkin, and the team color cvars.
Builds and renders the forced enemy-model preview using cg_forceEnemyModel, cg_forceEnemySkin, and the enemy color cvars.
Builds and renders the forced red-team model preview using cg_forceRedTeamModel and the team color cvars.
Builds and renders the forced blue-team model preview using cg_forceBlueTeamModel and the enemy color cvars.
Formats and paints the current browser source label as `Source: %s`.
Draws the current server preview shader or falls back to `menu/art/unknownmap`.
Runs and draws the current server cinematic when available, then falls back to UI_DrawNetMapPreview.
Formats and paints the current browser filter label as `Filter: %s`.
Refreshes the cached opponent playerInfo from ui_opponentModel and renders the preview through UI_DrawPlayer.
Draws the current map or net-map display name for the shared all-maps ownerdraw path, with the final flag selecting the active selection slot.
Reads ui_opponentName into the shared UI cvar buffer and paints it directly.
Resolves the active bot or character name, falls back to Sarge for invalid entries, and paints the resulting label.
Paints the selected bot skill label from the retail skill-level table.
Paints `Red` or `Blue` from the current redBlue toggle state.
Paints the current crosshair with the retail size, brightness, health-color, and palette-color handling before drawing the selected shader.
Computes rendered text widths for ownerdraw labels such as handicap, team names, skill, and selected-player text.
Fetches the localized next-map text block from the string table and paints it into the target rect.
Reads ui_votestring, centers it using the text-measure helper, and paints the current vote text.
Renders the in-game server settings panel, including gametype limits, gameplay modifiers, and the modified-weapons icon list.
Paints the starting-weapon icon row and the queued-primary label using the retail loadout mask and modified-weapon indicators.
Builds the player and team name caches from player configstrings and refreshes the selected-player cvars.
Refreshes the player cache on a timer and paints either the selected teammate name or the local player name.
Paints either the pulsing active-refresh message or the cached ui_lastServerRefresh timestamp.
Scrolls the current server MOTD across the rectangle with the Welcome to Team Arena fallback and wraparound dual-paint handling.
Paints either the normal keybind hint or the pending-bind cancellation prompt based on the current keybind state.
Retail-only ownerdraw helper behind UI_ADVERT that tints, draws, and updates the current advertisement surface.
Paints the GL vendor, version, renderer, and pixel-format diagnostics, then wraps the extension string into multiple lines across the available rect.
Draws the retail crosshair-color selector bar and current swatch while honoring the crosshair-health color override.
Large ownerdraw dispatcher assigned into uiDC.ownerDrawItem during _UI_Init.
Evaluates the retail UI_SHOW_* visibility flags against gametype, leader, browser, and score-state conditions.
Cycles the handicap cvar in 5-point steps, clamps it to the retail 5..100 range, and wraps through the minimum and maximum values.
Advances the single-player gametype selector, refreshes cap and frag limits, reloads best scores, and resets the map feeder when the map count changes.
Cycles the net gametype selection, skips the retail hidden enums, updates the visible and actual gametype cvars, resets the current net map, and refreshes the feeder.
Cycles the join-game gametype selector, updates ui_joinGameType, and rebuilds the visible server browser list.
Cycles g_spSkill through the retail one-to-five range and wraps at the ends.
Cycles the network source selector, skips the unused Mplayer slot, rebuilds the server list, optionally starts a refresh, and writes ui_netSource.
Cycles the active server filter index with wraparound and rebuilds the server display list.
Cycles the bot selection, switching between the retail character and bot-list bounds based on the active gametype.
Cycles the bot skill selector through the retail skill-level list with wraparound.
Cycles cg_drawCrosshair through the retail crosshair set with wraparound and writes the updated cvar.
Rebuilds the player list, cycles the selected player or Everyone entry for team leaders, and updates both selected-player cvars.
Retail-only handler that cycles cg_crosshairColor through the numbered palette range and writes the wrapped result back to the cvar.
Routes ownerdraw key events to the retail per-widget handlers for handicap, gametype, team, bot, crosshair, and selected-player controls.

Pure display-context getValue callback installed by `_UI_Init`; the committed retail body returns a hardcoded `0.0`, so shared ownerdraw color-range checks only ever evaluate against zero unless another layer replaces the callback.
Loads the retail $modlist pairs into the mod feeder, interns both mod names and descriptions, and stops at MAX_MODS.
Enumerates .roq files from the video directory, strips the extension, uppercases the names, and interns the movie feeder entries.
Builds the dm_<protocol> extension pair, enumerates demos, strips the protocol suffix, uppercases the names, and interns the demo feeder entries.
Handles retail UI script-side cvar synchronization for name, rate, colorbits, and mouse-pitch updates, exactly matching the current UI_Update helper.

Runs menu-script commands including the retail callvote-map preview and submission branches, the preserved legacy `getCDKey` and `verifyCDKey` cvar-state handlers, vote/admin handlers, favorite management, and model-color synchronization, then logs unknown UI script handlers. The retail `ingame_callvote.menu` file binds this same path through `ui_cvGameType`, `updateCallvoteMapPreview`, `FEEDER_CVMAPS`, and `voteMap`; in the committed HLIL, the preview branch calls straight into `UI_FeederSelection` for feeder `19`, the submit branch formats `callvote map %s %s\n` inline from the selected net map plus `UI_GetCallvoteGametypeToken(ui_cvGameType)` or an empty fallback, and the CD-key branches read and write `cdkey1..4`, `cdkey`, `cdkeychecksum`, and `ui_cdkeyvalid` without surfacing a bounded standalone popup owner. The committed branch chain then advances directly to `loadArenas`; the source-side `openCredentials` / `UI_CDKeyMenu` path is therefore currently reconstruction-side compatibility rather than a separately bounded retail branch.
Pure no-op display-context getTeamColor callback installed by `_UI_Init`; shared team-color paint and script paths still call the slot, but the committed retail body does not populate a color.

Marks maps active for the FEEDER_CVMAPS callvote filter using the active callvote-gametype state behind ui_cvGameType and returns the visible preview-row count. In retail this is the first helper in the FEEDER_CVMAPS preview-selection chain later reused by `UI_FeederSelection` before `UI_SelectedMap` resolves the chosen visible row, and it consumes the same `ui_cvGameType` state later reused by the `voteMap` submission token path.
Marks maps active for the current gametype filter and returns the visible map count, with the single-player path requiring the extra GT_SINGLE_PLAYER bit.
Builds models/players/%s/lower_%s.skin from the retail player-model table and returns whether that lower-skin file exists.
Counts valid retail player-model entries, caching successful skin probes and skipping the team-color skin aliases for the FEEDER_Q3HEADS-style path.
Inserts a server index into the displayServers array at a validated position by shifting later entries upward.
Removes the first matching server index from the displayServers array and compacts the remaining entries.
Binary-searches the sorted display server list with trap_LAN_CompareServers and inserts the server at the resolved position.
Rebuilds the visible server list, refreshes MOTD metadata, filters server rows, and updates the displayed server counters.
Reorders named server-status cvars to the front of the table and translates Quake Live gametype numbers into display names.
Fetches server status text, tokenizes cvar and player lines in place, and populates the serverStatusInfo line table.
Static UI-main helper that performs a case-insensitive substring search for the find-player browser path.
Drives the asynchronous find-player scan, harvesting matching names from server status replies and updating the found-server list.
Refreshes the selected server's status table, resetting outstanding requests on forced rebuilds and retrying until data arrives.

Returns the active row count for the committed retail UI feeder set: heads, maps, servers, clans, player/team lists, mods, demos, cinematics, and the callvote-map filter. The committed `uix86.dll` body stops short of the scoreboard/team feeder family, which is already mapped on the cgame `cgDC` side; the actual clan-feeder branch exists in the dispatcher, but no committed retail menu item or bounded host `qz_instance` / `EnginePublish` browser contract currently consumes it. The similarly named `UI_CLANNAME` / `UI_CLANLOGO` ownerdraws are older `teamList[]` branding carry-overs rather than clan-feeder consumers.

Converts a visible feeder row into the backing active map index and returns that map's display name. Retail FEEDER_CVMAPS selection rebuilds visibility through `UI_CVMapCountByGameType` and then uses this helper to resolve the backing map before refreshing `ui_currentNetMap`.

Resolves feeder row images such as character heads, map levelshots, callvote maps, and clan emblems. The actual clan-feeder emblem branch remains compatibility-heavy because no committed retail menu item currently consumes the clan UI surfaces and the bounded host `qz_instance` / `EnginePublish` browser contract exposes neither a clan-roster RPC nor a clan event family. This is separate from the misleading `UI_CLANLOGO` ownerdraw label, which is an older `teamList[]` branding path.

Returns feeder row text for the committed retail UI feeder set: heads, maps, server browser columns, mods, movies, demos, clans, and the older player/team list families. The committed `uix86.dll` dispatcher does not currently expose scoreboard or match-summary feeder branches; those scoreboard/team callbacks are already anchored in cgame, and the actual clan-feeder text branch currently lacks both a committed retail menu consumer and a bounded host/browser contract with clan RPCs or clan events. The misleading `UI_CLANNAME` ownerdraw label is instead an older `teamList[]` branding path.

Applies feeder selection side effects such as model cvar writes, cinematic refresh, server-status selection, and the FEEDER_CVMAPS branch that rebuilds the visible callvote set through `UI_CVMapCountByGameType`, resolves the chosen row through `UI_SelectedMap`, and then refreshes `ui_currentNetMap` for the retail voteMap preview path. The paired submit leg later reuses that preview state plus `UI_GetCallvoteGametypeToken(ui_cvGameType)`.
Parses one characters block from teaminfo into the retail model and skin table and builds each head icon path.
Loads the retail teaminfo buffer and dispatches the top-level characters block into Character_Parse.
Parses gametype and joingametype blocks into the UI gametype tables.
Parses map entries into uiInfo.mapList and replaces the last slot on overflow.
Dispatches gametypes, joingametypes, and maps blocks to the specific parsers.
Pauses or resumes the client while toggling KEYCATCH_UI and clearing key state on unpause.
Retail-only console-command helper behind listPlayerModels that prints the currently loaded model and skin entries.
Reads the renderer glconfig and rebuilds the 640x480 virtual-screen bias and scale values used by the retail UI drawing helpers.
Full UI bootstrap: registers cvars, wires uiDC, loads menus, initializes scores, bots, and render assets, and seeds the retail `ui_cvGameType` callvote filter cvar to `-1` before menu scripts run.
Routes key events to the focused menu, closes unfocused UI on ESC, and clears KEYCATCH_UI when no focused menu remains.
Accumulates cursor deltas, clamps them to the 640x480 UI bounds, and forwards movement into Display_MouseMove.
Loads the non-ingame menu set and clears the ingame-load state flag.

Switches on the native UIMENU command, updates key catcher and pause state, reloads menu sets when needed, and activates the committed retail `main`, `error_popmenu`, `ingame`, `ingame_about`, and `joingame_menu` flows. In the current jump table, case `5` (`UIMENU_TEAM`) lands on `joingame_menu`, the retained `UIMENU_NEED_CD` and `UIMENU_BAD_CD_KEY` values do not resolve to standalone menu-activation branches, and no separate committed `UIMENU_POSTGAME` branch is exposed. The ingame-menu branch also rebuilds the player list and resets the retail `ui_cvGameType` callvote filter cvar to `-1` before activating the ingame menu set.
Returns whether any visible fullscreen menu is active.
Extended native export-table predicate that scans the retail menu array and returns qtrue when any menu has WINDOW_VISIBLE set.
Formats byte counts as bytes, KB, MB, or GB strings for the connect and download UI.
Formats millisecond durations into sec, min/sec, or hr/min strings for the connect and download UI.
Measures text width and paints it centered around the supplied x coordinate.
Wraps text on spaces to fit a maximum width and paints each line centered.
Formats download progress, transfer rate, and ETA strings for the connect screen.
Draws the connection and download status screen, including abort and retry messaging.
Extended native export-table drawer that optionally paints a named menu and then centers the retail 'Waiting on Advertisement' and 'Press ESC to cancel' prompts.
Normalizes the current force-model and force-skin cvars to lowercase, checks for the bright skin token, and updates the paired UI bright-model toggle cvar.
Refreshes the retail ui_forceTeamModelBright state from cg_forceTeamModel/cg_forceTeamSkin and marks the team-model preset state dirty.
Refreshes the retail ui_forceEnemyModelBright state from cg_forceEnemyModel/cg_forceEnemySkin and marks the enemy-model preset state dirty.
Plays the preview voice clip for the selected cg_announcer profile and mirrors the current selection into ui_announcer.
Registers the UI vmCvar table during startup.
Updates the UI vmCvar table and runs any registered per-cvar change handlers.
Stops the server browser refresh pass and prints the listed-server and player summary.
Pumps visible server pings and finalizes the refresh when the scan completes.
Starts LAN or global server refresh commands and stamps the refresh time cvars.
Loads weapon, barrel, and flash assets for the UI player preview model.
Toggles the legs animation state and primes the jump timer when LEGS_JUMP is selected.
Applies any pending legs animation override, then forces the resolved legs animation.
Toggles the torso animation state and primes the gesture or attack timers for the selected sequence.
Applies any pending torso animation override, then forces the resolved torso animation.
Advances torso gesture, attack, and weapon-switch sequencing and triggers weapon model swaps.
Advances jump and land leg sequencing while maintaining the shared preview jump-height state.
Lerps a parent tag, offsets origin through the parent axes, and copies backlerp onto the child entity.
Lerps a parent tag, composes child and parent axes, and positions the rotated entity on that tag.
Selects an animation record, validates the animation number, and primes the lerp-frame timing state.
Advances the current animation frames over time and computes the active backlerp value.
Smoothly swings an angle toward a destination with tolerance-based speed scaling and clamp limits.
Converts view and move angle deltas into the fixed strafe yaw adjustments used by the preview model.
Builds the preview legs, torso, and head axes from view angles, movement direction, and swing state.
Spawns and draws a sprite marker above the player preview origin.
Updates the barrel spin or coast state from realtime and torso attack animation state.
Full player preview renderer for legs, torso, head, weapon, barrel, muzzle flash, chat icon, and accent lights.
Resolves head skin and model file paths through the team, head, and fallback search variants.
Registers lower, upper, and head skins and falls back across model path variants.
Parses animation.cfg content for UI player model animation state.
Registers player model geometry, skins, and animation data for preview rendering.
Clears the preview struct, registers the requested model set, and seeds default machinegun state.
Updates preview view and move angles, weapon transitions, animation sequencing, and chat state.
Allocates from the fixed UI memory pool with 16-byte alignment and emits the out-of-memory warning.
Lowercases a string and accumulates the 2048-slot hash used by the interned string table.
Interns a string into the pooled string table and reuses existing entries by hash-chain lookup.
Prints string-pool and UI memory-pool usage as percentages and byte totals.
Formats a parser error with source filename and line information and prints it as an ERROR.
Interpolates each RGBA component between two colors and clamps the results into the 0..1 range.
Reads one token from a script string and converts it to a float.
Reads one parser token, accepts an optional minus sign, validates TT_NUMBER, and returns a float.
Parses four float components from a script string into a vec4 color.
Reads four numeric parser tokens into a vec4 color with parser-side error reporting.
Reads one token from a script string and converts it to an integer.
Reads one parser token, accepts an optional minus sign, validates TT_NUMBER, and returns an integer.
Parses four float values from a script string into a rectangle definition.
Reads one token from a script string and interns it through String_Alloc.
Reads one parser token and interns the token text through String_Alloc.
Collects a brace-delimited parser script into a single interned command string.
Sets the draw color, paints the shared gradient bar shader, and then restores the draw color.
Advances fade-in or fade-out alpha state using the next-time gate, clamp, and fade amount.
Core window renderer handling filled, gradient, shader, team-color, and cinematic styles plus border variants.
Builds the item screen rectangle from parent offsets and rectClient while clearing cached text extents.
Recomputes an item's screen-space rectangle from its parent menu and current border offsets.
Runs immediately after retail menu parse to walk advert items, compute their bounds, and seed each item background through the setup advert-cell-shader callback.
Walks the same advert items during menu open, close, and refresh paths, recomputing each item background through the refresh advert-cell-shader callback.
Scans retail preset-list items in a menu, compares their linked preset definitions against live cvar values, and forces the preset-list cvar to `Custom` when no named preset still matches.
Rebuilds each child item's screen-space rectangle from the menu's current screen origin and border offsets while clearing cached text extents.
Clears focus from every item in a menu, returns the previous focus item, and runs any leaveFocus scripts.
Counts menu items whose window name or group matches the requested token.
Returns the Nth menu item whose window name or group matches the requested token.
Returns whether the supplied point lies strictly inside the given retail rect bounds, with a null-rect guard.
Parses a target color slot plus four floats and writes backColor, foreColor, or borderColor on the current item.
Retail stub for the setasset command that parses and interns one asset token without further mutation.
Parses one asset token, registers it as a shader, and stores the handle in item->window.background.
Returns the first menu item whose window.name matches the requested item name.
Copies the display-context team color callback result into the current item's background color.
Parses a target item/group name, a color field selector, and a vec4, then applies it across matching items.
Shows or hides all matching items by name or group and stops active cinematics when hiding.
Scans the global menu array and returns the menu whose window.name matches the requested token.
Finds a named menu, runs its close script when visible, clears visibility and focus state, and refreshes the menu afterward.
Runs close scripts for all menus, clears visibility and focus state across the global menu array, and refreshes each menu afterward.
Parses one item or group token and forwards it to Menu_ShowItemByName with the show path enabled.
Parses one item or group token and forwards it to Menu_ShowItemByName with the hide path enabled.
Parses one item/group token and marks matching items visible plus fading-in.
Parses one item or group token and marks matching items visible plus fading-out.
Parses one menu name and routes it through the named-menu activation helper.
Reads a cvar and two menu names, then opens the zero or non-zero branch menu.
Parses one menu name and closes it through the named-menu close path, including the menu close script.
Retail-only menu toggle command that alternates a named menu between the open and close helpers.

Finds matching items by name or group, marks them visible plus in-transition, seeds `offsetTime`, copies the source rect into `rectClient`, copies the destination rect into `rectEffects`, derives the per-step X/Y/W/H deltas into `rectEffects2`, and refreshes screen coordinates.
Parses a target name, source rect, destination rect, cadence time, and step divisor, then forwards the setup into `Menu_TransitionItemByName`.

Finds matching items by name or group, marks them visible plus orbiting, seeds `offsetTime`, stores the orbit center in `rectEffects.x/y`, seeds the starting `rectClient.x/y`, and refreshes screen coordinates.
Parses orbit target, start position, orbit center, and cadence time, then forwards the setup into `Menu_OrbitItemByName`.
Retail-only advert command that parses one integer token, invokes the advert activation callback, and clears the current item's focus bit.
Parses an item name, resolves it in the parent menu, clears prior focus, runs the new onFocus script, and plays the focus sound.
Parses one model token and writes it into the retail player-model cvar through the display-context setCVar callback.
Parses one head model token and writes it into the retail player-head cvar through the display-context setCVar callback.
Parses a cvar name/value pair and forwards it to the UI setCVar display callback.
Parses one console command token, formats it as "%s ; ", and appends it through the executeText callback.
Parses one sound token, registers it, and starts it on the local UI sound channel.
Parses one track token, stops the current background track, and restarts it as both intro and loop.
Tokenizes a semicolon-delimited UI script, dispatches handlers from the retail command table, and falls back to executeText for unknown commands.
Checks the item's enable/show cvar test lists against the current cvar string and returns the retail visibility/enabled decision for the requested flag.
Rejects decorative or cvar-gated items, clears prior focus, runs the new onFocus path, and updates the parent menu cursor index.
Computes the maximum listbox scroll position from feeder count, element size, and horizontal versus vertical layout.
Converts the listbox start position into the scrollbar thumb pixel position for the current orientation.
Uses live cursor drag state to draw the thumb in motion and otherwise falls back to the normal thumb position helper.
Reads the slider cvar, clamps it to the edit-field range, and maps the normalized value into the retail slider thumb x position.
Builds the slider thumb hit rectangle around Item_Slider_ThumbPosition and returns the thumb-hover flag when the cursor overlaps it.
Tests the cursor against the retail listbox arrows, page regions, and thumb, returning the WINDOW_LB_* bitmask.
Refreshes listbox hover flags from Item_ListBox_OverLB and updates cursorPos when the pointer enters the selectable body region.
Applies cvar gating, drives mouseEnter and mouseEnterText scripts, and delegates listbox-specific hover handling when needed.
Runs the retail mouse-exit scripts and clears the text-hover and listbox arrow hover flags for the item.
Implements the retail listbox keyboard, mouse click, paging, selection, and double-click handling paths.
Handles focused yes-no activation by hit-testing the cursor inside the item and toggling the bound cvar on mouse or enter keys.
Scans the current multi-choice cvar value and returns the matching option index, defaulting to `0` when retail finds no entry.
Returns the current display label for the bound multi-choice cvar, falling back to the retail empty string when no entry matches.
Advances the current multi-choice selection on focused mouse or enter activation and writes the next string or numeric cvar value through the retail display context.
Returns the current display label for the bound preset-list cvar, falling back to the retail `Custom` string when no linked preset matches.
Scans the current preset-list cvar value and returns the matching option index, or `-1` when retail finds no named preset.
Advances the focused preset-list selection, applies the linked hidden preset item's cvar set, and writes the selected preset name back through the retail display context.
Implements retail edit-field key handling, including cursor movement, insert and overwrite edits, numeric gating, and backspace or delete behavior on the active cvar buffer.
Autorepeats listbox arrow scrolling by simulating repeated listbox handle-key calls while tightening the repeat interval.
Updates listbox startPos from thumb dragging and keeps the retail auto-scroll timing state in sync during capture.
Maps the captured cursor position across the slider track and writes the resulting value back through the UI setCVar callback.
Installs the retail capture callback and scroll state for listbox arrow repeat, listbox thumb drag, and slider thumb drag.
Processes slider mouse and enter activation by mapping cursor position across the retail 96-pixel track and writing the resulting cvar value.
Clears or starts retail capture state, rejects key-up events, and dispatches item-type-specific key handling for listboxes, sliders, binds, ownerdraws, and choice widgets.
Walks backward through menu items with wraparound until Item_SetFocus accepts a candidate, then recenters mouse handling on that item.
Walks forward through menu items with wraparound until Item_SetFocus accepts a candidate, then recenters mouse handling on that item.
Walks the global menu array, stopping active window cinematics plus ownerdraw cinematics across every visible UI menu.
Implements out-of-bounds popup click routing by closing the current menu, activating the menu under the cursor, forwarding the key, and maintaining pause and cinematic state.
Builds the retail corrected text rectangle from item->textRect and shifts the y origin upward by the text height when the rect is active.
Routes retail UI key input across bind capture, edit capture, popup OOB clicks, focused-item dispatch, menu cursor navigation, and menu-level script or screenshot actions.
Computes item->textRect dimensions and aligned origin from the current item text or cvar string using the retail text-metrics callbacks.
Builds the live item text color, including fade, focus pulse, blink, and disabled-color paths gated through Item_EnableShowViaCvar.
Auto-wraps item text against the item width, updates retail textRect metrics per line, and paints each wrapped segment.
Walks carriage-return-delimited text lines, updates retail textRect metrics, and paints the wrapped text block line by line.
Dispatches retail wrapped and auto-wrapped text paths or computes aligned text metrics and color before drawing plain item text.
Paints the base item text plus the editable cvar string, including focus cursor rendering and paintOffset scrolling for active fields.
Reads the bound cvar value, builds the standard focus pulse color, and paints the retail `Yes` or `No` label beside the item text.
Resolves the current multi-choice display label through Item_Multi_Setting, then paints it with the standard text-item alignment and focus handling.
Resolves the current preset-list display label through Item_PresetList_Setting, then paints it with the standard text-item alignment and focus handling.
Refreshes the retail binding table by querying the current two-key assignment for each command and storing bind1 and bind2 back into g_bindings.
Writes the current retail binding table back through setBinding for both key slots and appends `in_restart` to refresh input.
Scans the retail binding-command table and returns the matching binding index or `-1` when the name is unknown.
Builds the uppercase display string for the named command's primary and secondary bindings, joining them with ` or ` and falling back to `???`.
Paints the retail slider bar and thumb, using Item_Slider_ThumbPosition to place the handle against the bound cvar value.
Paints the retail slider-color bar and colorized thumb, reusing Item_Slider_ThumbPosition to place the handle against the bound cvar value.
Builds the current key-binding display string, applies the focused bind pulse, and paints the label plus bound-key text.
Implements retail key-bind capture, cancellation, deletion, replacement, and Controls_SetConfig update behavior.
Builds the retail model-preview refdef and entity, advances model rotation when configured, and renders the item model inside the window rect.
Paints retail listbox contents, scrollbar arrows and thumb, selection highlighting, and feeder-driven image or text rows.
Computes ownerdraw color and optional text-label state, then calls the retail ownerdraw callback for the item.

Performs the retail per-item runtime chain: advances orbit and transition motion through `nextTime`, `offsetTime`, `rectEffects`, and `rectEffects2`, applies visibility/show-or-hide cvar gating, runs `Window_Paint`, and then dispatches the item-type-specific paint path.
Scans the global menu array and returns the first menu whose window carries both focus and visible flags.
Resolves the target menu by current focus or explicit name, resets listbox selection state for index zero, stores the new cursorPos, and fires the feederSelection callback.
Finds the named menu, clears focus on the rest, runs the activation onOpen and sound paths, pushes the previous focus onto the open-menu stack, and closes cinematics.
Paints one visible or forced menu, including fullscreen background handling, ownerdraw visibility gating, Window_Paint, per-item paint dispatch, and the debug rectangle.
Runs the two-pass retail menu hover and focus update, including cvar gating, corrected-text hit testing, mouse enter and leave scripts, and focus assignment.
Allocates and initializes retail listbox, edit, multi, or model typeData blocks according to item->type, including the default edit-field paint limit.
Shared retail parser for the item and menu `name` keywords that interns the parsed string into window.name.
Parses a focus-sound token, registers it through the display context, and stores the resulting sound handle on the item.
Parses and interns item->window.group from the retail item keyword table.
Validates model typeData, registers the item model asset, and seeds the preview angle with the retail rand()%360 path.
Parses the retail item widescreen mode, rejects out-of-range values, and marks the item widescreen override as set.
Parses a shader token and stores the registered no-mip shader handle in item->asset.
Validates model typeData and parses three floats into the preview model origin vector.
Shared retail float parser reused by the item `model_fovx` and `elementwidth` keywords.
Shared retail float parser reused by the item `model_fovy` and `elementheight` keywords.
Validates model typeData and parses the preview model rotation-speed integer.
Validates model typeData and parses the preview model angle integer.
Parses four floats into item->window.rectClient.
Marks the item window with WINDOW_DECORATION.
Validates listbox typeData and marks the retail listbox as not selectable.
Marks the item window with WINDOW_WRAPPED.
Marks the item window with WINDOW_AUTOWRAPPED.
Marks the item window with WINDOW_HORIZONTAL.
Parses item->type and immediately validates or allocates retail typeData for types that require it.
Validates listbox typeData and parses the retail list element style.
Validates listbox typeData, parses the column count plus per-column pos, width, and maxChars triples, and clamps to the retail maximum.
Shared retail parser for the `visible` keyword; it parses an int and sets WINDOW_VISIBLE when non-zero.
Parses item->window.ownerDraw and forces item->type to ITEM_TYPE_OWNERDRAW.
Parses item->alignment.
Shared retail int parser reused by item `textalign` and menu `fadeCycle`.
Shared retail float parser reused by item `textaligny` and menu `fadeAmount`.
Retail-only item parser that interns the item's font token.
Parses item->textscale.
Parses item->textStyle.
Shared retail four-float color parser for the `backcolor` keyword.
Shared retail four-float color parser for the `forecolor` keyword that also marks WINDOW_FORECOLORSET.
Shared retail four-float color parser for the `bordercolor` keyword.
Shared retail color parser for the `outlinecolor` keyword.
Retail item-only color parser for the `altrowcolor` keyword.
Retail item-only color parser for the `elementcolor` keyword.
Retail item-only color parser for the `selectedcolor` keyword.
Parses the retail outline-image shader token and stores the registered handle on the item.
Shared retail parser for the `background` keyword that registers a no-mip shader and stores the handle.
Shared retail parser for the `cinematic` keyword that interns the cinematic name string.
Validates listbox typeData and parses the `doubleclick` script into the retail listbox callback slot.
Retail-only item parser for the integer `cellId` keyword.
Retail-only item parser that interns the `defaultContent` string.
Retail-only item parser for the integer `precision` keyword.
Parses the item `onFocus` script block.
Parses the item `leaveFocus` script block.
Parses the item `mouseEnter` script block.
Parses the item `mouseExit` script block.
Parses the item `mouseEnterText` script block.
Parses the item `mouseExitText` script block.
Parses the item `action` script block.
Shared retail float parser reused by the item `feeder` and `special` keywords.
Parses the first retail cvar-test string slot.
Parses the second retail cvar-test string slot.
Parses the third retail cvar-test string slot.
Parses the fourth retail cvar-test string slot.
Validates the item edit or multi typeData, parses the backing cvar name, and resets the retail edit-field min, max, and default values when applicable.
Retail-only item parser that reuses `ItemParse_cvar` and then seeds the parsed cvar through the display-context setter with the empty default string.
Validates edit typeData and parses the integer `maxChars` limit.
Validates edit typeData and parses the integer `maxPaintChars` limit.
Parses a cvar name plus default, min, and max floats into the edit-field range definition.
Parses a brace-delimited multi list of string and float pairs into the float-backed multi-selector table.
Retail-only integer variant of the cvar-range parser that reads the cvar plus default, min, and max values and marks integer mode.
Retail-only preset parser that reads brace-delimited preset labels plus numeric values into the multi-selector string and float tables.
Parses alternating brace-delimited string pairs into the string-backed multi-selector table; retail also reuses this handler for cvarPresetList.
Parses low, high, and color triplets and appends them to the item's retail color-range array up to the fixed limit.
Shared retail int parser for the `ownerdrawFlag` keyword.
Shared retail int parser for the retail-only `ownerdrawFlag2` keyword.
Parses the enable-cvar script and marks the item with CVAR_ENABLE gating.
Parses the disable-cvar script and marks the item with CVAR_DISABLE gating.
Parses the show-cvar script and marks the item with CVAR_SHOW gating.
Parses the hide-cvar script and marks the item with CVAR_HIDE gating.
Shared retail script parser reused by the `showCvar2` and `hideCvar2` keywords.
Shared retail script parser reused by the `showCvar3` and `hideCvar3` keywords.
Shared retail script parser reused by the `showCvar4` and `hideCvar4` keywords.
Clears the retail item keyword-hash table and inserts every item parser keyword record from the static keyword array.
Parses an itemDef block, resolves tokens through the item keyword hash, and reports unknown or malformed retail item keywords.
Normalizes the menu font path, registers the retail text, small, and big fonts on first use, and stores the resolved menu font token.
Parses the menu fullScreen flag.
Parses the retail menu widescreen mode and rejects out-of-range values.
Parses four floats into menu->window.rectClient.
Shared retail int parser for the `style` keyword.
Parses the menu `onOpen` script block.
Parses the menu `onClose` script block.
Parses the menu `onESC` script block.
Shared retail int parser for the `border` keyword.
Shared retail float parser for the `borderSize` and `bordersize` keywords.
Parses four floats into menu->focusColor.
Parses four floats into menu->disableColor.
Retail-only menu parser that reads the four-float `backgroundSize` value.
Parses menu->window.ownerDraw.
Marks the menu window with WINDOW_POPUP.
Marks the menu window with WINDOW_OOB_CLICK.
Shared retail string parser reused by item `text` and menu `soundLoop`.
Shared retail float parser reused by item `textalignx` and menu `fadeClamp`.
Allocates, initializes, parses, post-initializes, and parents a new menu item until the retail item limit is reached.
Clears the retail menu keyword-hash table and inserts every menu parser keyword record from the static menu keyword array.
Parses a menudef block, resolves tokens through the menu keyword hash, and reports unknown or malformed retail menu keywords.
Runs any active capture callback, paints every menu, and draws the retail debug FPS overlay when debug mode is enabled.
Retail null-menu variant of Display_MouseMove that routes the current cursor position to the focused popup menu or to every menu and returns qtrue.
Caches every menu's cinematic and sound dependencies by replaying the menu, item, and window content-cache walk behind the retail ui_cache command.
Returns whether the cursor is over any non-decoration active item in a visible menu, including corrected-text-rect handling for text items and cvar visibility gating.
Exact MSVC GS cookie verifier used by the protected retail stack-frame epilog and wired into the EH4 exception path.
Runs the CRT process-attach and process-detach initializer, including constructor or destructor dispatch around the native DLL entrypoint.
Exact MSVC DLL startup wrapper that initializes the CRT, forwards into _DllMain@12, and handles attach-failure unwind paths.
Resets the cached DLL startup reason to -1 after ___DllMainCRTStartup finishes its attach or detach path.
Module start stub that runs ___security_init_cookie on process attach and then tail-calls ___DllMainCRTStartup.
GS failure reporter that captures processor state and terminates through the Windows unhandled-exception path.
Registers an atexit callback through the encoded CRT onexit tables, falling back to _onexit when the DLL CRT is not initialized.
Tiny CRT cleanup stub that releases lock 8 after __dllonexit updates the encoded onexit tables.
Thin wrapper over __onexit that returns 0 on success and -1 on failure.
Checks the DOS and PE signatures for a candidate module image before CRT section scanning.
Finds the PE section record that covers a candidate RVA inside the current image.
Uses __ValidateImageBase and __FindPESection to test whether a pointer lies in a non-writable section of the current module image.
CRT thunk that tail-calls the initterm constructor walker.
CRT thunk that tail-calls the initterm_e constructor walker.
CRT fatal-startup message exit thunk.
Small DLL entry wrapper that tail-calls the module's exported dllEntry function.
Exact MSVC SEH frame prolog helper for GS-protected functions.
Exact MSVC SEH frame epilog helper for GS-protected functions.
Exact EH4 exception handler wrapper that forwards into _except_handler4_common with the security-cookie callbacks.
MSVC GS cookie initializer that seeds __security_cookie and its complement from time, pid, tid, tickcount, and performance-counter state.
CRT debugger hook thunk.
CRT lock-release thunk.
CRT DLL onexit registration thunk.
CRT lock-acquire thunk.
CRT EH4 common-handler thunk.
Compiler float-to-int helper that uses the SSE fast path when enabled and falls back to __ftol2 otherwise.
Compiler x87 long-double-to-int helper used by retail color, layout, and coordinate conversion code.
Imported memset thunk.
Compiler intrinsic cosine thunk.
Compiler intrinsic sine thunk.
Stack probing helper used before large local allocations.
Compiler intrinsic atan2 thunk.
Compiler intrinsic tangent thunk.
Compiler unsigned 64-bit division helper.
Compiler 64-bit multiply helper.
